globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self';base-uri 'self';object-src 'none';frame-ancestors 'self';form-action 'self';img-src 'self' https: data:;font-src 'self' data:;style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com;script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com;connect-src 'self' https://api.sleeper.app;worker-src 'self' blob:;trusted-types default; require-trusted-types-for 'script';
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
